SEARCH
Module jtamaro
Package jtamaro.graphic

Class Rotate

java.lang.Object
jtamaro.graphic.Graphic
jtamaro.graphic.Rotate
public final class Rotate extends Graphic
A new graphic that rotates counterclockwise a provided graphic around its pinning position by the given angle. A negative angle corresponds to a clockwise rotation.

  • Constructor Summary
